subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath been presented before the Throne, and its head hath been crowned and adorned with the diadem of Divine remembrance, that it may serve as a testimony [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتابت لدی العرش حاضر و راس آن باکلیل ذکر الهی مکلل و مزین شد تا گواهی باشد
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @wisdom [hikmat]
